description_long: This bench features a modern, minimalist design with a gently curved seat and backrest made from dark wooden slats. The slats are evenly spaced and run horizontally along both the seat and back, providing a visually cohesive look. The bench is supported by two sturdy, black metal legs that are slightly angled and joined at the base for stability. The absence of armrests gives it a sleek, open appearance, making it suitable for communal or public spaces. The wood appears to have a matte finish, highlighting its natural grain and texture. Its robust construction and weather-resistant materials suggest it is designed for long-term use in urban outdoor environments.
description: A modern bench with dark wooden slats and black metal legs, featuring a curved seat and backrest. The design is sleek, open, and suitable for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the horizontal wooden slats, and the gentle curve of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the thickness of the wooden slats and the metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench, the alignment of the wooden slats, and the supporting metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the bench's profile and the continuous curve from seat to backrest.
attribute_leg_design: two black metal legs joined at the base
